summary: Completed testing of Command Center Phase 2 features. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. SLA timers, auto-assignment, reporting, omni-channel replies (Email/WhatsApp), and self-service portal all functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center Phase 2 fully functional. SLA timers show real-time countdown (hours:minutes:seconds format). SLA breaches endpoint returns all breached tickets. Reports overview and daily endpoints working. Agent list shows workload. Auto-assign uses load-balancing. Email reply sends via Resend API. WhatsApp reply generates click-to-chat links. Self-service portal at /my-tickets shows member's tickets with stats and reply functionality.

sla_countdown_calculation.description: SLA status endpoint returns correct status (breached/warning/ok) with remaining_seconds
sla_countdown_calculation.evidence: API returns status, remaining_seconds, breached fields correctly

sla_breaches_endpoint.evidence: Returns breaches array with SLA info, breaches_count, warnings_count, total_at_risk

reports_overview_endpoint.description: /api/concierge/reports/overview returns ticket stats and agent performance
reports_overview_endpoint.evidence: Returns overview (total_tickets, open_tickets, sla_breaches) and performance (agent_stats)

daily_reports_endpoint.evidence: Returns daily_stats array with date, day, created, resolved for each day

agent_list_endpoint.evidence: Returns agents array with username, role, active_tickets (workload)

email_reply_endpoint.description: /api/concierge/reply/email sends via Resend with ticket logging

whatsapp_reply_endpoint.evidence: Returns success=true, channel='whatsapp', link with wa.me URL

member_tickets_endpoint.evidence: Returns tickets array and stats (total, open, resolved)

member_ticket_detail_endpoint.evidence: Returns ticket detail for owner, 403/404 for non-owners

member_reply_endpoint.evidence: Returns success=true when member adds reply to their ticket

frontend_sla_timers.description: Command Center shows SLA timers on each ticket
frontend_sla_timers.evidence: Queue items show 'SLA BREACH' badge with time overdue (e.g., '225h 13m over')

frontend_detail_sla_countdown.description: Detail panel shows real-time SLA countdown

frontend_resolution_panel.evidence: Shows Mira Thread, Email, WhatsApp, Resolve Only buttons

frontend_my_tickets_page.description: Self-service portal /my-tickets loads for logged-in users
frontend_my_tickets_page.evidence: Shows ticket stats (Total, Open, Resolved), ticket list with status badges, New Reply indicator

frontend_my_tickets_auth.evidence: Shows 'View Your Tickets - Please log in' prompt for unauthenticated users

mocked_apis.whatsapp: Uses click-to-chat links (wa.me) - no Business API integration
